name: whale-tutor
description: AI-driven interactive learning platform — course authoring CLI

scripts.prepublishOnly:
node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const need=['_bundle/server/dist/main.js','_bundle/web/index.html','_bundle/db/init/01-schema.sql','_bundle/templates/python-basics/course.yaml']; const miss=need.filter(p=>!fs.existsSync(p)); if(miss.length){console.error('
✗ _bundle missing files (run `pnpm build:cli-bundle` from monorepo root first):
  '+miss.join('
  '));process.exit(1)} else {console.log('✓ _bundle complete')}"
